messages.author: eve_thompson
messages.text: Checking. Looks like Stripe dashboard: webhook delivery failure rate 100%, all returning HTTP 400. Investigating.

messages.author: frank_nguyen
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: eve_thompson
messages.text: Found the issue: Stripe SDK v3.0.0 changed Webhook.construct_event() to require raw request bytes.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: eve_thompson
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
